title: aspilia ciliata
intro: Aspilia ciliata, also known as African jointfir, is a tropical plant native to Africa and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimalarial, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aspilia ciliata include reducing fever and inflammation, relieving symptoms of malaria, and protecting against infections. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
